{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Li Min Redflower
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Li Min Redflower]] is an [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“Frozen Blade and Silver Heart,” Underlady Li Min Redflower put in, her voice creaking behind her dark veil.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
